creator: jw@innerewut.de
text:
Update rubygem-hoe to 1.1.7. This update depends on the update of rubygem-rubyforge to 0.4.0 which is included below.

Fix: 

Get the patches from

http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rubygem-hoe-1.1.7.patch
http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rubygem-rubyforge-0.4.0.patch
How-To-Repeat: Install the patches from http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rubygem-hoe-1.1.7.patch and http://blog.innerewut.de/files/rubygem-rubyforge-0.4.0.patch
